title: BIENESTAR FARM OUTREACH - 211info
text: BRIDGING CULTURES BIENESTAR FARM OUTREACH Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers an opportunity to set up an appointment with a Community Health Worker (CHW) to visit a farm and provide extreme weather supplies as well as information about wellness and safety. 1382 SE 3rd Avenue Canby, OR 97013 Eligibility: Farmworkers and families of farmworkers Hours: By appointment only Email (503) 420-0018 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 420-0018 Fabiola Zavala Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or email for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clackamas and Marion Counties SITE HOURS: Monday/Wednesday/Thursday 9am-3pm, Tuesday/Friday by appointment only Services: Disaster Preparedness Information * Agricultural Laborers Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL PROGRAMS - ADULT ESL CLASSES FOOD - BIENESTAR SAFETY AND WELLNESS EVENT INFORMATION SERVICES - MULTICULTURAL COMMUNITY EVENTS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. BRIDGING CULTURES
